scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 407 Proxy Authentication Required [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Proxy-Authenticate: Digest realm="auto.com",qop="auth",opaque="1234567890abcedef",nonce="152afcdf6746b96593b7e0501fa1031db24323effd7",algorithm=MD5,stale=false Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 500 Server Link Monitor Status Down [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
